case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. CARLA OCFEMIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF WEBBANK/AVANT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT OCFEMIA, CARLA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-15-2021
